arts.ttl: ‘Hoping’: What Bayern Munich want to happen with Mathys Tel after Tottenham interest – journalist
arts.sum: Mathys Tel is the player making the most headlines as we head into the final days of the transfer window. Indeed, a number of big...

arts.ttl: Manchester United contact Bayern Munich over Mathys Tel
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Manchester United are the latest team to contact Bayern Munich over the future of forward Mathys Tel. United are interested in bringing in Tel on loan as…

arts.ttl: Jamie Redknapp reveals behind the scenes Harry Kane message as Tottenham push for Mathys Tel transfer
arts.sum: Spurs in advanced talks with Bayern Munich over potential £50m swoop

arts.ttl: Bayern bosses speak on Tel's situation amid exit links
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany and Max Eberl have given their thoughts on Mathys Tel's situation after it was recently confirmed that the Frenchman wants to leave Bayern before the transfer window closes.

arts.ttl: Spurs reach £50m agreement with Bayern for Tel
arts.sum: Tottenham and Bayern Munich have reached a verbal agreement on a £50m transfer for Mathys Tel.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich makes offer for Juventus midfielder Arianna Caruso
arts.sum: The Bavarians are reportedly swooping in lightning-fast fashion on Juventus star and Italian women’s national team player Arianna Caruso, with news from ilBiancoNero’s Miriana Cardinale early on Thursday: Cardinale reported both Bayern and Monaco as possible destinations.

arts.ttl: Champions League draw LIVE with Liverpool, Arsenal and Villa's paths and Man City's huge tie
arts.sum: While eight clubs have already booked their place in the Champions League's round of 16, another 16 - including some of the competition's biggest hitters - face a play-off round

arts.ttl: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou addresses claim £50m Mathys Tel bid has been accepted
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou refuses to give anything away when quizzed on whether his club are pushing to sign Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel.

arts.ttl: Broken promises? Report implies Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany has not kept his part of the bargain with young players
arts.sum: Just like Mathys Tel, Adam Aznou didn’t want to leave Bayern at all, but the coach hasn’t kept his promises regarding game time this season. According to a report from Foot Mercato journalist Hanif Ben Berkane (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich youngsters Mathys Tel and Adam Aznou do not want to leave the club, but could find themselves out the door soon enough.

arts.ttl: 'Key factor': Fabrizio Romano shares what Tottenham have now done after agreeing fee for Mathys Tel with Bayern
